instructions: Attach title and description as sticky note

annotations.title: Loading Indicator Stuck & No Tasks
annotations.description: Project Manager Olivia: "It also has a loading indicator. Hmm.. It is stuck on loading.. I am logged in but there are no tasks here."

annotations.title: Missing Register/Login CTAs
annotations.description: Freelance Designer David: "There aren't any clear calls to action." Difficulty in registering.

annotations.title: Confusion about Login State
annotations.description: Student Sarah: "I don't see any options to register for an account or even log out. It says 'Welcome back', so maybe I'm already logged in somehow? This is confusing."

annotations.title: Unexpected Login
annotations.description: Retired Gardener George: "Maybe I'm already logged in? But I don't remember ever using this thing before…"

annotations.title: Unexpected Login/Redirect Issue
annotations.description: Cynical Software Engineer Chris: "Register? Nope, already logged in apparently. Guess I'll skip right to the tasks then. Website should've checked that and redirected me to the log out screen."
